title: Hide Mob Nametags
description: Hides nametags of mobs with isCustomNameVisible set to false
body:
Hide Mob Name tags is a simple mod that changes the behaviour of mob nametags. By default, the CustomNameVisible NBT tag, when disabled, only hides the nametag of a given mob if you're not looking directly at them, as opposed to completely hiding them. This mod changes that so you'll NEVER see their name at all! (Unless they kill you or something.)

Mod requested by Nekomaster1000!
